contract_summary: Get-wrapper that acquires a reference on the target device stored in the target private data, under the protection of the tgtdev_lock. Returns the device pointer with an extra reference or NULL if no device is associated. The caller must release the reference with a corresponding put when done and must hold tgtdev_lock during the call.
